items.title: Marokkaanse droom spat uiteen in krankzinnige Afrika Cup-finale
items.summary: De Afrika Cup is dit jaar voor Senegal. Gastland Marokko kwam heel dicht bij de voltooiing van een historische triomftocht voor eigen publiek, maar bezweek onder de druk. In een finale die het voorstellingsvermogen van de grootste fantasten te boven ging, viel het doek voor de Atlasleeuwen .

items.title: Lees hier terug hoe de bizarre Afrika Cup-finale verliep
items.summary: Zondag was het Derby Day in de Eredivisie. We trapten af met de Derby van het Noorden tussen SC Heerenveen en FC Groningen, vervolgden met de Twentse Derby Heracles Almelo - FC Twente en sloten af met de finale van de Afrika Cup.

items.title: Drie afgekeurde goals, vijfmaal het aluminium: zegereeks Barcelona voorbij
items.summary: De zegereeks van Barcelona is zondagavond ten einde gekomen gekomen. Op bezoek bij Real Sociedad ging de ploeg van Hansi Flick onderuit, mede omdat er drie goals afgekeurd werden en het aluminium vijfmaal werd geraakt door de bezoekers.

items.title: ​Senegal 1-0 Morocco: ​Pape Gueye hits Afcon final winner in extra time against hosts after ​chaotic scenes over disputed penalty – live reaction
items.summary: ⚽ Afcon final updates, 7pm GMT (8pm in Rabat) kick-off ⚽ Jonathan Wilson on this Afcon | Follow us on Bluesky 1 min Peep peep! Morocco, in their white change strip (don’t ask), kick off from right to left as we watch. After a spectacular rendition of the Moroccan anthem, it’s time for the main event: the Afcon 2025 final. Continue reading...

items.title: Huiberts geeft tekst en uitleg over ontslag Martens bij AZ
items.summary: Maarten Martens is niet langer de hoofdtrainer van AZ. De Belg was twee jaar in dienst bij de Alkmaarders en kan met trots terugkijken op zijn periode. Directeur voetbalzaken Max Huiberts geeft tekst en uitleg over het ontslag.

items.title: AZ ontslaat Maarten Martens
items.summary: AZ heeft Maarten Martens ontslagen. De Belgische coach ging dit weekend met 3-1 onderuit tegen PEC Zwolle en moet het veld ruimen. Leeroy Echteld is tot het einde van dit seizoen de hoofdtrainer.

items.title: Senegal walk off pitch in Afcon final over controversial penalty
items.summary: Senegal beat Morocco to win the Africa Cup of Nations for a second time - but only after the final was overshadowed when they temporarily refuse to play when the hosts are awarded a controversial stoppage time-penalty with the match 0-0.

items.title: Thomas Frank takes training as uncertainty rages over his Tottenham future
items.summary: Frank under intense pressure after West Ham defeat Irate supporters call for his sacking with team 14th Thomas Frank oversaw training at Tottenham on Sunday and maintained a business-as-usual front before the club’s Champions League tie against Borussia Dortmund on Tuesday night – despite the uncertainty that is raging over this future. The manager’s continued employment is in the balance after Spurs’ last-gasp 2-1 home defeat against West Ham on Saturday when the club’s supporters called for him to be “sacked in the morning”. The result kept Tottenham 14th in the Premier League and continued their miserable run in the competition. They have won only two of their past 13 games in the league. Continue reading...

items.title: Utd's Martinez hits back over 'toddler' criticism
items.summary: Lisandro Martínez has challenged Paul Scholes and Nicky Butt to repeat their criticism to his face after the pair said Erling Haaland would make the Manchester United defender look like "a little toddler" in the Manchester derby.

items.title: Sources: PSG finalizing deal for Barcelona starlet
items.summary: Paris Saint-Germain are finalising the remaining details for the transfer of Dro Fernández, the latest prodigy from Barcelona's academy, sources confirmed to ESPN.

items.title: Arteta: Arsenal denied clear penalty in Forest draw
items.summary: Mikel Arteta has said Arsenal were denied a "very clear penalty" in Saturday's 0-0 draw at Nottingham Forest.

items.title: Senegal beat Morocco in chaotic finale at AFCON
items.summary: The Africa Cup of Nations final went to extra time after finishing 0-0 in a chaotic end which saw Senegal players walk off the field when host Morocco was awarded a stoppage-time penalty.

items.title: Villa slip vs. Everton in chase to close Arsenal gap
items.summary: Aston Villa's Premier League title ambitions suffered a damaging blow as an 11-game home winning streak ended with a 1-0 defeat to Everton.

items.title: Government pulls amendment to Hillsborough law after backlash
items.summary: Proposed change relating to spies was criticised by campaigners and MPs as allowing an opt-out for senior officials The government has pulled an amendment to its proposed Hillsborough law amid concerns from campaigners and MPs that the legislation was being watered down and had become a “car crash” for the government. The public office (accountability) bill aims to force public officials and contractors to tell the truth after disasters. Continue reading...

items.title: 'Arsenal will never forgive themselves if they don't win title now'
items.summary: This is Mikel Arteta and Arsenal's "now or never" moment as Premier League title rivals stumble badly, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.

items.title: Saudi Arabia Darts Masters: Draw and schedule with Littler, Van Gerwen in action
items.summary: Draw and schedule from the Saudi Arabia Darts Masters, with Luke Littler, Michael van Gerwen and Luke Humphries all in action.

items.title: Results, fans, fall-outs - factors that lead to managerial pressure
items.summary: From bad results to a clash with a club's owners - BBC Sport takes a look at some of the factors that lead to managers coming under pressure.

items.title: Barry secures deserved win for Everton against Villa
items.summary: Everton's Thierno Barry capitalises on a mistake by Aston Villa's Emi Martinez for a 1-0 win to The Toffees, which stops Villa going second in the Premier League.

items.title: 'Oddest interview I have seen!' | Redknapp and Young bemused by Emery exchange
items.summary: Jamie Redknapp and Ashley Young were left bemused by Unai Emery's post-match interview after Aston Villa's defeat to Everton.

items.title: 'Abandoned' or 'business' - was Glasner right to 'attack' Palace owners?
items.summary: Oliver Glasner's outburst after Crystal Palace were beaten at Sunderland has led to increased speculation over his future at the club but will he be sacked?
